nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle gang involved in drug trafficking and other crimes in Manitoba since 2000.
Biker gang in Manitoba that later became the Hells Angels Winnipeg chapter.
Biker gang in Manitoba that disbanded in 1998.
Hells Angels puppet club in Montreal.
Puppet club of the Rockers in Winnipeg, later joined los Brovos.
Puppet gang serving the Hells Angels in Manitoba, involved in drug sales and intimidation.
First Nations gang in Manitoba that bought drugs from the Zig Zag Crew.
First Nations gang in Manitoba that bought drugs from the Zig Zag Crew.
First Nations gang in Manitoba that bought drugs from the Zig Zag Crew.
Outlaw motorcycle club involved in criminal activities in Manitoba since 2000.
Puppet gang of the Hells Angels in Manitoba, involved in drug trafficking.
Puppet gang founded by Hells Angels to replace the Zig Zag Crew.
Outlaw motorcycle club, rival to Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, Stadnick had the Angels' puppet club in Montreal, the Rockers, set up a puppet club in Winnipeg called the Redliners.
edges.context: The Hells Angels controlled the Rockers as a puppet club.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, Stadnick had the Angels' puppet club in Montreal, the Rockers, set up a puppet club in Winnipeg called the Redliners.
edges.context: The Rockers established the Redliners as a puppet club.

edges.evidence_quote: On 22 December 2000, Stadnick arranged for Dew and los Bravos gang to join the Hells Angels as 'full patch' members... The los Bravos gang became the Hells Angel Winnipeg chapter.
edges.context: Los Brovos became the Hells Angels Winnipeg chapter.

edges.evidence_quote: A puppet gang, The Zig Zag crew, was founded to serve the Hells Angels.
edges.context: The Zig Zag Crew was a puppet gang serving the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: The Zig Zag Crew in turn sold drugs to other criminal groups in Manitoba, most notably the First Nations gangs such as the Redd Alert, the Manitoba Warriors and the Native Syndicate.
edges.context: Zig Zag Crew sold drugs to Redd Alert.

edges.evidence_quote: The Zig Zag Crew in turn sold drugs to other criminal groups in Manitoba, most notably the First Nations gangs such as the Redd Alert, the Manitoba Warriors and the Native Syndicate.
edges.context: Zig Zag Crew sold drugs to Manitoba Warriors.

edges.evidence_quote: The Zig Zag Crew in turn sold drugs to other criminal groups in Manitoba, most notably the First Nations gangs such as the Redd Alert, the Manitoba Warriors and the Native Syndicate.
edges.context: Zig Zag Crew sold drugs to Native Syndicate.

edges.evidence_quote: Kevin Sylvester, the younger brother of Darwin Sylvester, had nursed a grudge against the Hells Angels for the presumed murder of his brother.
edges.context: The Hells Angels were in conflict with the Spartans due to the presumed murder of Darwin Sylvester.

edges.evidence_quote: Satsatin's recording also revealed that every member of the Zig Zag Crew had to pay $1, 000 to a particular Hells Angel per month and do most of the Hells Angels work for them in exchange for the possibility of one day being allowed to join the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Zig Zag Crew was a puppet gang that paid tribute and worked for the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: To replace the Zig Zag Crew, the Hells Angels founded a new puppet gang, the Redlined Support Crew.
edges.context: Hells Angels founded the Redlined Support Crew as a new puppet gang.

edges.evidence_quote: A former member of the Zig Zag Crew, Fat Corey, who had allied himself with the Rock Machine was heard to make insulting remarks about the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Rock Machine is a rival gang; a former Zig Zag Crew member allied with Rock Machine insulted Hells Angels.
